text: Metal Attack - allows you to use metal blocks to attack (if you have gold or iron blocks in your inventory, you can throw them. The damage will be higher).
Metal Knives - attacks with knives on a radius in all directions except up and down.
Metal Skin - gives invulnerability to most attacks, but slows the player down (also useless against the first poison elemental attack).
$(o)Condition:$() Copper, gold, or iron ore/blocks within 16 blocks.
Iron Man: –20% incoming damage, +10% outgoing damage.
Counterattack: 15% chance to gain "Dash IV" for 15 sec (once per 60 sec).
